product.name: ArDura 500 Fr
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny PA 6.6 — warianty powlekane, FR i wzmocnione
product.familyDescriptorEn: PA 6.6 fabrics — coated, FR and reinforced variants
product.categorySourceGroup: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.
product.titleDescriptor: Pa6.6 woven flame retardant coated fabric for Police, Firefighters and Gendarme wear
product.specLine: 240 g/m², 95% Pa 6.6 5%Pu, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Waterproof, Flame Retardant Woven Fabric
descriptions: ArDura 500 Fr is lightweight 95% polyamide 6.6 5% polyurethane woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear.
The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices.
The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.
The fabric has flame retardant coating on back side which gives flame retardant and waterproof function at the same time.
Pa6.6 woven flame retardant coated fabric for Police, Firefighters and Gendarme wear
240 g/m², 95% Pa 6.6 5%Pu, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Waterproof, Flame Retardant Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>2500N; Weft>2000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>150N; Weft>120N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1
Allergenic Dyestuffs | Not Detected | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: categorySourceGroup: "Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications."
matches.rationale: Product description explicitly states intended use for military, police and gendarme wear, directly matching the military/uniformed-services category.

evidence: "It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear."
matches.rationale: Explicit statement of use for motorcyclist (motobiker) police wear and a technical parameter naming the application as Police Motobikers.

evidence: titleDescriptor: "Pa6.6 woven flame retardant coated fabric for Police, Firefighters and Gendarme wear"
applicationImageLabels: "Turnout Gear pant with kneepad", "Turnout Gear with kneepad"
norms include EN 343 (protection against rain) and EN ISO 14116 (limited flame spread)
matches.rationale: Title explicitly names firefighters as an intended wearer group and application images depict turnout gear, a term specific to firefighting protective clothing.
Product properties explicitly list hi-vis and the fabric is certified to EN ISO 20471, the core high-visibility safety standard, directly supporting the hivis application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antibacterial property is present but no explicit medical, healthcare or hospital use is stated.
No mention of electrical arc protection, high-voltage work or EMI shielding; only generic FR/antistatic-like properties are absent or unstated.
No explicit welding, foundry or metal-splash protection use mentioned.
